'''shajoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okrug|okrug]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okrug|okrug]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shajoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || shæjeyeth || shæjeyej || shæjeyesh || shæjeye
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || shajojoyoth || shajojoyoj || shajojoyosh || shajojoyo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || shajoyoth || shajoyoj || shajoyosh || shajoyo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || shajofyofth || shajofyofj || shajofyofsh || shajofyof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shajoyotho || shajoyojo || shajoyosho || shajoyoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || shajoyoth || shajoyoj || shajoyosh || shajoyo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shajoyothol || shajoyojol || shajoyoshol || shajoyokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shajoyoothotho || shajoyoojojo || shajoyooshosho || shajoyooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || shajoyothon || shajoyojon || shajoyoshon || shajoyokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shajoyothooro || shajoyojooro || shajoyoshooro || shajoyokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
